ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cherry, flesh and skin, pitted, raw
Orange, flesh without skin, without seeds, raw
Lemon, flesh without skin, without seeds, raw

ingredients_text: sugar, glucose syrup, palm fat, gelatin, moisturizer: sorbitols, acidifier: citric acid, 1,1% concentrated multifruit juice (cherry, raspberry, strawberry, orange, lemon), emulsifier: sunflower lecithin, natural aroma, plant colouring extracts (curcuma), concentrated plant colours (black carrot, turmeric), natural citrus aroma, natural orange aroma, plant colouring extracts (carrot, blackcurrant),
